recommendations.title: The Cameraman
recommendations.overview: A photographer takes up newsreel shooting to impress a secretary.

recommendations.title: Steamboat Bill, Jr.
recommendations.overview: The just-out-of-college, effete son of a no-nonsense steamboat captain comes to visit his father whom he's not seen since he was a child.

recommendations.title: Battling Butler
recommendations.overview: A meek millionaire masquerades as a boxing star to win a girl's heart.

recommendations.title: Sherlock Jr.
recommendations.overview: A film projectionist longs to be a detective, and puts his meager skills to work when he is framed by a rival for stealing his girlfriend's father's pocketwatch.

recommendations.title: Seven Chances
recommendations.overview: Struggling stockbroker Jimmie Shannon learns that, if he gets married by 7 p.m. on his 27th birthday -- which is today -- he'll inherit $7 million from an eccentric relative.

recommendations.title: The General
recommendations.overview: During America’s Civil War, Union spies steal engineer Johnny Gray's beloved locomotive, 'The General'—with Johnnie's lady love aboard an attached boxcar—and he single-handedly must do all in his power to both get The General back and to rescue Annab

recommendations.title: The Navigator
recommendations.overview: The wealthy and impulsive Rollo Treadway decides to propose to his beautiful socialite neighbor, Betsy O'Brien. Although Betsy turns Rollo down, he still opts to go on the cruise that he intended as their honeymoon. When circumstances find both Rollo

recommendations.title: The Goat
recommendations.overview: A series of misadventures occur when Buster is mistaken for a criminal on the lam.

recommendations.title: The Electric House
recommendations.overview: Botany major Buster mistakenly graduates in electrical engineering and is hired to wire a new home.

recommendations.title: Rocky
